chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4438 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 24.12.2024 Mr. Nisar Ahmed advocate holds brief for Mr. Fayazuddin Rajpar, advocate for the petitioner Present petition has impleaded the following respondents, Federation of Pakistan, through Secretary Law & Justice, Pak-Secretariat, Pakistan Registrar, Islamabad High Court, Islamabad & Federal Public Service Commission through its Chairman Agha Khan Road, F-5/1, F-5, Islamabad, not one of them is within the jurisdiction of this Court. The prayer clause reads as follows:- (i) To declare the impugned amendment of rule 12 & 19 of Rules 2011 passed by the Respondent No.2 is illegal, unlawful, unconstitutional, malafide, arbitrarily, capricious and in violation of principles of natural justifice, equity and fair play. (ii) To suspend the operation of the impugned amendment of Rule 12 & 19 in Rules 2011 passed by the Respondent No.2., till final decision of this Petition. (iii) Any other relief deem fit and proper by this Honourable Court. It is inconceivable that any rules etc. framed by the Islamabad High Court could be assailed in writ jurisdiction of this Court. On the last date, petitioner was confronted as to maintainability and today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought. This petition being misconceived prima facie frivolous is dismissed with cost of Rs.10,000/- to be deposited in the High Court Clinic within one week.
